# Support

Need help with Reicon? Here's where to go.

## 📖 Documentation
The usage guide covers installation and usage for React, Vue, and the CDN:
- https://reicon.dev/usage

## 💬 Questions & ideas
For "how do I…", ideas, and general chat, use Discussions:
- https://github.com/dqev/reicon/discussions

## 🐛 Bugs & icon requests
Found a bug or want a new icon? Open an issue with the right template:
- https://github.com/dqev/reicon/issues/new/choose

## 📧 Private / security
For private matters or security reports, email **hello@reicon.dev**
or use [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/dqev/reicon/security/advisories/new).

## 💖 Support the project
Reicon is free and open source. If you'd like to support its development:
- GitHub Sponsors: https://github.com/sponsors/dqev
- Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/dev3

Please **don't** use the issue tracker for support questions — Discussions are a
better fit and keep issues focused on bugs and concrete requests. 💜
